name: /compliance-remove: an operator-added entry (origin: operator-added) can be removed without the --force-default flag
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf -- '- id: acme-internal-policy
  name: ACME Internal Policy
  url: https://acme.example.com/policy
  authoritative_publisher: ACME Legal
  jurisdiction: us
  applicable_to: [internal]
  identifier_scheme: acme-policy
  why_authoritative: |
    a
    b
    c
  fetch_frequency: weekly
  legal_review_required: false
  paywalled: false
  origin: operator-added
' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-remove.sh" acme-internal-policy --catalog "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml" && ! grep -q acme-internal-policy .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
